calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-14-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP INC.'s Motion For Change Of Venue.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Mercy Housing Management Group, Inc.'s (erroneously sued as Mercy Housing California) motion for change of venue, which is unopposed, is granted. The matter is transferred to Calaveras County Superior Court.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via CourtCall:

Paul R. Scheele Esq. for plaintiff(s) Mary C. Bons.

Clark Schmutz Esq. for defendant(s) Mercy Housing California.

The jury trial date is continued to Oct-14-2024 per agreement of parties and there will be no further continuances due to scheduling conflicts.

Judge Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk MMACADANGD; Not Reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Set For Trial On May-20-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
